data.enhanced_question: QQQ performance over 10 years, including current price, daily change percentage, total return, annualized return (CAGR), volatility, maximum drawdown, and daily closing price history for the full 10-year period.

metadata.enhancement_summary: Enhanced with specific performance metrics (CAGR, volatility, drawdown) and explicit 10-year historical time series requirements to guide data retrieval.
